No Sign-Up. Just a QR Code.

Type your text or URL, click generate, and you are done. No account, no email, no marketing spam, no hidden limits. Your data lives in your browser and never touches a server.

Use the QR tool on the homepage — it works the same with or without this page. There is no special sign-up gate.

FAQ

Why do most QR tools require sign-up?

Because they host your QR code data on their servers (dynamic QR). Sign-up lets them track scans, sell analytics, and eventually charge you. Static QR codes encode everything in the image itself — no server, no account needed.

Can I use this for commercial QR codes without signing up?

Yes. There are no commercial restrictions. Generate as many codes as you need for business cards, flyers, menus, or packaging.

What happens to my data?

Nothing. The QR code is generated in your browser. No text, URL, or data is sent anywhere. Close the page and everything disappears.

© 2026 QRMint — free QR code generator. Static codes never expire.
